The '''Giant horned hopper''' was a species of bipedal, hopping, herbivorous mammal indigenous to the [[Vast Veldt]] of [[Cathar (location)/Legends|Cathar]]. They were often killed by the [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] in blood hunts.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 4]]
